notes: Previz expansion: Google Earth Studio keyboard, multi-camera placement with teleport, view-rec (MP4) in cbar, smooth Catmull-Rom camera animation with 3D markers + path, scissor-based outer-margin view-shrink, cinema sensor presets (Alexa 35/65, V-Raptor, Venice 2, URSA 12K, C70, BMPCC), capture-burn-in HEIGHT row, touch elevation ▲▼ pad, generic-ZIP drop accepts raw splat/mesh archives. Distance-measure panel simplified: per-point world-coordinate inputs and the ステップ nudge selector are gone — A / B / C now show as uniform top-to-bottom rows with a placed ✓ chip, and Point C is added on demand via a button (was a checkbox). Demo scene autoloads with curated transform (Pos Y 1.5 / Rot Y 12°); newly added objects (cube/sphere/event/figure) snap to the nearest 1 m grid cell and rest on the floor. Perf monitor is now display-refresh-aware: it detects the real panel Hz (fixes bogus readings on 120 Hz Apple ProMotion iPhone/iPad/Mac) and the 余剰 (headroom) bar reflects true GPU spare capacity (100 − GPU負荷) instead of vsync-locked wall time. Full-app QA pass: fixed English-mode i18n leaks (demo-scene button, Help, quality badge, Export modal GLB/OBJ/JSON/Cancel, Settings title, Splats-1/4, layer-panel Import/Export, perf budget word) and corrected the stale distance-measure hint that said “right-click” when placement is now left-click.
